# Support

Thank you for using Luxelle Landing Page! As an open-source project, our support is primarily community-driven.

## Where to get help:

1. **Documentation:** Please refer to the extensive markdown files located in our [docs](../docs/) directory for code-level questions.
2. **Issue Tracker:** If you encounter a bug, search the [Issues Tracker](../../issues) to see if someone else has already reported it.
3. **Bug Reports:** If your issue is entirely new, feel free to open a formal Bug Report using our predefined GitHub Issue template!
